context: Tests whether the agent applies the on-device Foundation Models guidance for availability, locale, structured generation, tool calling, streaming, context budgeting, and error handling.

checklist.name: Availability cases
checklist.description: Uses SystemLanguageModel availability gating and distinguishes disabled intelligence, `.modelNotReady` system-asset readiness, and ineligible-device fallback paths.

checklist.name: Locale support
checklist.description: Uses a locale support check before generation and prefers a fallback-aware locale API rather than relying only on a raw language list.

checklist.name: Structured schema
checklist.description: Models the result as typed generated content with guided fields and avoids asking for loose JSON text as the main integration path.

checklist.name: Streaming partials
checklist.description: Uses structured streaming or partial generated content and notes that SwiftUI must tolerate incomplete fields while streaming.

checklist.name: Tool setup
checklist.description: Defines a small, necessary tool set at session creation and treats tool implementations as concurrency-safe.

checklist.name: Tool autonomy
checklist.description: Explains that the model decides whether and when to call tools, and recommends pre-running deterministic required lookups when the result must be used.

checklist.name: Context budget
checklist.description: Accounts for the shared input/output context window, including schema/tool context cost and token or context-size checks.

checklist.name: Session lifecycle
checklist.description: Mentions stateful sessions, prewarming before interaction, and avoiding concurrent requests on a single session.

checklist.name: Generation errors
checklist.description: Maps generation failures such as guardrails/refusal, context overflow, unsupported guide or locale, unavailable assets, rate limiting, and decoding failure to fallback or retry behavior.
